subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses and made them a glory unto all the worlds, and through them hath manifested the exaltation of His Cause amidst His creation. Verily He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی نزل الایات و جعلها عزه للعالمین و بها ظهر اعزاز امره بین خلقه انه
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @proclamation to the people of the world, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God
